article.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Buys 25% Stake in Almeria
article.meta_description: Discover how Cristiano Ronaldo's CR7 Sports Investments acquired a 25% stake in Spanish second-division club UD Almeria, marking a new phase.
article.content:
Football icon Cristiano Ronaldo has made a significant move into club ownership, acquiring a 25% stake in Spanish second division club UD Almeria. This strategic investment was finalized through the Portugal captain's CR7 Sports Investments company.

While the financial specifics remain undisclosed, this deal represents a long-term commitment from the legendary athlete to contribute to football beyond his active playing career.

Key Facts

  • Cristiano Ronaldo has purchased a 25% ownership stake in UD Almeria.
  • The acquisition was made via his company, CR7 Sports Investments.
  • This represents a long-term strategic investment for the Portugal captain.
  • UD Almeria is a Spanish second-division club, taken over by a Saudi Investment group in May 2025.

A Strategic Investment Beyond the Pitch

The acquisition underscores the athlete's long-standing ambition to transition into club ownership after his illustrious playing career. This move reflects a calculated decision to invest in a club with strong foundational elements and promising growth prospects.

The former Real Madrid star expressed his enthusiasm for this new venture, stating his desire to support the club's leadership in its upcoming phase of development.

"I have long had the ambition to contribute to football beyond the pitch," the legendary forward commented. "UD Almería is a Spanish club with a strong foundation and clear growth potential. I wish to work with the team leading the club to support it in its new phase of growth."

UD Almeria's New Chapter and Coach's Reaction

UD Almeria, a club in Spain's second division, underwent a significant change in May 2025 when it was acquired by a Saudi Investment group. This recent investment by the Portugal captain marks another pivotal moment in the club's trajectory.

Juan Francesc Ferrer 'Rubi', the coach of Almeria, shared his excitement regarding the news. He highlighted the positive impact such an influential figure could have on the team, the city, and the entire province.

"From our perspective, we're very happy," Rubi stated. "I think it's great news because someone like him, with his extensive knowledge of sport and football, can really help a club like ours. It's very exciting for the whole club, the city, and the province."

Rubi also acknowledged the existing positive relationship between the five-time Ballon d'Or winner and the current owners of Almeria. This relationship likely facilitated the smooth integration of the football legend as a shareholder.

Connecting the Dots: Al Nassr, World Cup, and Future Plans

Despite his new ownership role, Cristiano Ronaldo remains an active player, having extended his contract with Saudi Pro League club Al Nassr through June 2027. He celebrated his 41st birthday on February 5, showcasing remarkable longevity in his career.

The Portugal captain is also anticipated to lead his national team in what will be a record sixth World Cup appearance this summer. Fans can keep track of all the latest World Cup news as the tournament approaches.

Important Update: The investment in UD Almeria is explicitly stated as a long-term strategic move, aligning with the player's previously expressed desire to own a football club post-retirement.

When questioned about the possibility of the global superstar eventually playing for Almeria, Coach Rubi responded with enthusiasm. He indicated that such a decision would ultimately rest with the player himself.

For now, fans are eager to see how the legendary forward's influence will shape UD Almeria's future. His extensive experience and profound understanding of the game are expected to provide invaluable support.

This development adds another layer to the narrative of one of football's greatest figures. It highlights his continuous engagement with the sport, even as he prepares for a potential record-breaking World Cup 2026 qualifiers campaign.

Stay ahead with the latest news and detailed guides for the upcoming tournament.
article.faq_html:
Who acquired a stake in UD Almeria?

Cristiano Ronaldo, through his company CR7 Sports Investments, acquired a 25% ownership stake in Spanish second division club UD Almeria.

What type of investment is this for Cristiano Ronaldo?

This acquisition is considered a long-term strategic investment from the Portugal captain, aligning with his stated ambition to contribute to football beyond his playing career.

What was the reaction from UD Almeria's coach?

UD Almeria coach Juan Francesc Ferrer 'Rubi' expressed great excitement, welcoming the legendary player and noting that his extensive knowledge of sport and football would significantly help the club.

Could Cristiano Ronaldo ever play for Almeria?

Coach Rubi stated that playing for Almeria would be an "extraordinary and wonderful" possibility, but ultimately a question for Cristiano Ronaldo himself, as it is now "his club" as a shareholder.
